mapper.select: SELECT id, role_name, role_code, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM t_role WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, role_name, role_code, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM t_role WHERE role_name = #{roleName}
SELECT id, role_name, role_code, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM t_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode}
SELECT id, role_name, role_code, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM t_role WHERE role_name = 'USER'
SELECT id, role_name, role_code, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM t_role ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_role (id, role_name, role_code, description, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{roleName}, #{roleCode}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_role SET role_name = #{roleName}, role_code = #{roleCode}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
